name: Configure Diagnostic Logging for Troubleshooting
description: Create an exam configuration named 'Engineering Basics - DEBUG' for troubleshooting client issues on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080) using the credentials super-admin / admin. The configuration must have the Quit Password set to 'logcheck!23', the 'Show Quit Button' enabled, and the 'Log Level' set to 'Debug'.
